summary: Resend Email OTP Integration Testing Complete - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend sends real emails via Resend API (sent:true). No debug_otp exposed when emails send successfully. Rate limiting (30s), expired OTP, incorrect OTP, and user auto-creation all working correctly. Frontend auth page with inbox hint and resend cooldown verified.

tests.test: Rate limiting 429 for same email within 30s
Correct OTP returns token and user
New user auto-created on first verify (is_new_user:true)
Incorrect OTP returns 400 with proper error message
Token from OTP verify works with /api/auth/me
OTP code never leaked when email sends successfully
/auth loads with email input and Google login
OTP step shows 'Check your inbox and spam folder' hint
Toast shows 'Verification code sent — check your inbox'
Stay signed in for 30 days option present

mocked_apis.note: Resend integration is LIVE - real emails being sent via no-reply@auth.venuloq.com

context_for_next_testing_agent: Resend email OTP fully working. Key flows: 1) POST /api/auth/email-otp/send returns {sent:true, email:..., message:...} when Resend succeeds (no debug_otp). 2) OTP stored in MongoDB 'email_otps' collection, expires in 10 min. 3) For testing, read OTP directly from DB since no debug_otp returned. 4) Rate limit is 30 seconds per email. 5) Frontend at /auth has data-testids: auth-email-input, auth-send-otp-btn, auth-otp-input-{0-5}, auth-verify-otp-btn, auth-resend-otp-btn, auth-check-inbox-hint.
